project_type: Next.js 16 App Router with React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4
build_system: npm with Next.js CLI. Note: next.config.ts has a turbopack.root pointing to /Users/marqfiles/... which should be removed or adjusted for builds to work in this environment.
test_framework: No test framework configured (no test files, no test dependencies in package.json)
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npm run build to verify the app compiles. 3. Run npm run lint to check for lint errors.
environment_constraints: Open internet available. node_modules not yet installed. next.config.ts has a local turbopack.root path that may need removal for builds to succeed.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Steering file says: use html, css, js, vercel, postgresql, resend, tailwind, clerk, lucide react, vercel blob, react flow. The existing stack aligns (Next.js/React with Tailwind, Lucide React).
key_patterns: Single-page app currently in app/page.tsx (~500 lines). Uses 'use client' directive. Uses lucide-react icons, motion (framer-motion) for animations. CSS variables for theming in globals.css with Tailwind v4 @theme inline. Fonts loaded via next/font/google in layout.tsx. App Router file-based routing (app/ directory).
directory_structure: Root: package.json, next.config.ts, tsconfig.json, eslint.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs. app/: layout.tsx, page.tsx, globals.css, favicon.ico. public/: static assets.
